top_signals.title: European stocks set to rise as investors weigh Iran war's economic impact
top_signals.summary: Investors in the region are monitoring the U.S.-Iran war and a slew of economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Retail sales plummet as Iran war hits consumer confidence
top_signals.summary: Retail sales plummeted by 1.3 per cent in April, as Brits cut back on spending amid increasing pressure from the war in Iran. The huge fall in retail sales volumes in April was the largest since May last year, down from a 0.6 per cent rise in March, according to the Office for National Statistics (ONS). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: From BYD to Xpeng, memory chip crunch squeezes China's automakers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Two Americans plead guilty to assisting India-based tech support scam centers
top_signals.summary: Adam Young, 42, and Harrison Gevirtz, 33, pleaded guilty to misprision of a felony after they were accused of offering phone numbers, call routing services, call tracking tools and call forwarding services to India-based telemarketing fraudsters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Patlabor EZY’ turns everyday mecha bureaucracy into a delight
top_signals.summary: The new "Patlabor" series proves giant robots and police officers don't need world-ending stakes to be entertaining. Sometimes, office ennui is enough.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
